plugins.name: Moonpay
plugins.description: Crypto infrastructure skills for AI agents — wallet management, token trading, cross-chain bridges, fiat on/off ramp, and more via the MoonPay CLI.

skills.name: moonpay-auth
skills.description: Set up the MoonPay CLI, authenticate, and manage local wallets. Use when commands fail, for login, or to create/import wallets.

skills.name: moonpay-block-explorer
skills.description: Open transactions, wallets, and tokens in the correct block explorer. Use after swaps, bridges, or transfers to view results in the browser.

skills.name: moonpay-buy-crypto
skills.description: Buy crypto with fiat via MoonPay. Returns a checkout URL to complete the purchase in a browser.

skills.name: moonpay-check-wallet
skills.description: Check wallet balances and holdings. Use for "what's in my wallet", portfolio breakdown, token balances, allocation percentages, and USD values.

skills.name: moonpay-commerce
skills.description: Browse Shopify stores, search products, manage a cart, and checkout with crypto via Solana Pay. No login required.

skills.name: moonpay-deposit
skills.description: Create deposit links that accept crypto from any chain and auto-convert to stablecoins. No login required.

skills.name: moonpay-discover-tokens
skills.description: Search for tokens, check prices, get trading briefs, and evaluate risk. Use for token research, "is this token safe?", price checks, and market analysis.

skills.name: moonpay-export-data
skills.description: Export portfolio balances and transaction history to CSV or JSON files. Use for spreadsheets, tax reporting, or record-keeping.

skills.name: moonpay-feedback
skills.description: Submit feedback, bug reports, or feature requests for the MoonPay CLI. Use when the user encounters issues, wants to suggest improvements, or has general feedback.

skills.name: moonpay-fund-polymarket
skills.description: Install the Polymarket CLI and fund its wallet with USDC.e and POL on Polygon via MoonPay.

skills.name: moonpay-hardware-wallet
skills.description: Connect a hardware wallet (Ledger) to the MoonPay CLI. Sign transactions on the physical device — no private keys stored locally.

skills.name: moonpay-mcp
skills.description: Set up MoonPay as an MCP server for Claude Desktop or Claude Code. Provides all MoonPay CLI tools via the Model Context Protocol.

skills.name: moonpay-missions
skills.description: A series of missions that walk through every MoonPay CLI capability. Use when the user is new or says "get started", "show me what you can do", or "run the missions".

skills.name: moonpay-prediction-market
skills.description: Trade on prediction markets (Polymarket, Kalshi). Search markets, buy/sell positions, track PnL, and view trade history.

skills.name: moonpay-price-alerts
skills.description: Set up desktop price alerts that notify you when tokens hit target prices. Observe-only — no trading, just notifications.

skills.name: moonpay-swap-tokens
skills.description: Swap tokens on the same chain or bridge tokens across chains. Use when the user wants to swap, bridge, or move tokens.

skills.name: moonpay-trading-automation
skills.description: Set up automated trading strategies — DCA, limit orders, and stop losses — by composing mp CLI commands with OS scheduling (cron/launchd).

skills.name: moonpay-upgrade
skills.description: "Increase your MoonPay API rate limit by paying with crypto via x402."

skills.name: moonpay-virtual-account
skills.description: Set up a virtual account for fiat on-ramp and off-ramp. Covers KYC, wallet registration, bank accounts, onramp (fiat to stablecoin), and offramp (stablecoin to fiat).

skills.name: moonpay-x402
skills.description: Make paid API requests to x402-protected endpoints. Automatically handles payment with your local wallet.

plugins.name: Shipp
plugins.description: Real-time sports data for prediction market agents via Shipp API

plugins.name: Myriad
plugins.description: BNB Chain prediction market trading via Myriad Markets CLI

plugins.name: Messari
plugins.description: Messari x402 research skills — pay-per-request access to Messari's full API via USDC on Base. Asset data, signals, funding intel, alpha scouting, and AI deep research. No API key required.

skills.name: messari-x402
skills.description: Access Messari's full API via x402 pay-per-request — no API key needed. Asset data, market metrics, signals, news, fundraising, token unlocks, on-chain networks, and AI chat, all paid with USDC on Base.

skills.name: messari-token-research
skills.description: Full token research workflow using Messari x402 API. Fetches asset fundamentals, price history, sentiment signals, and news, then synthesizes a research brief via Messari AI. Total cost ~$1.00–$1.50 USDC per run.

skills.name: messari-alpha-scout
skills.description: Alpha scouting workflow using Messari x402. Scans mindshare gainers, trending topics, and news to surface emerging narratives and high-momentum assets. Total cost ~$1.25 USDC per run.

skills.name: messari-funding-intel
skills.description: Funding intelligence workflow using Messari x402. Scans recent rounds, M&A activity, venture funds, and organizations, then synthesizes a VC landscape brief via Messari AI. Total cost ~$0.75–$1.25 USDC per run.

skills.name: messari-deep-research
skills.description: Async deep-research report workflow using Messari AI. Starts a long-form research job, polls until complete, and returns a comprehensive report on any crypto topic, asset, or protocol. Cost varies; typically $0.50–$2.00 USDC.

plugins.name: Corbits
plugins.description: Paid API marketplace with x402 USDC micropayments via Corbits

plugins.name: Dune
plugins.description: Blockchain analytics via Dune REST API — DuneSQL queries against live on-chain data

plugins.name: Allium
plugins.description: On-chain blockchain data via Allium — prices, wallet balances, transactions, token info, and custom SQL analytics across 40+ chains.

plugins.name: Maiat
plugins.description: Trust verification and token safety checks for AI agents via Maiat Protocol

skills.name: maiat-trust-check
skills.description: Check if an agent or token is trustworthy before transacting. Returns trust score and verdict from 29,000+ indexed agents on Base. Use before any swap, transfer, or agent interaction.

skills.name: maiat-token-safety
skills.description: Check if an ERC-20 token is safe before swapping. Detects honeypots, high-tax tokens, and rug pulls. Use before any token swap.

plugins.name: Thoughtproof
plugins.description: Adversarial multi-model reasoning verification for AI agents before trades execute, via x402 micropayments on Base.

skills.name: thoughtproof-reasoning-check
skills.description: Verify whether an AI agent's decision is well-reasoned before executing. Adversarial multi-model critique (Claude, Grok, DeepSeek) returns ALLOW, BLOCK, or UNCERTAIN with confidence score. Use before any high-value swap, trade, or autonomous action.
